description: Authentiq provides an identity and authentication service centered on OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect. Its Connect product lets applications authenticate users and access identity/profile information through a hosted provider API.
summary: Authentiq.io exposes one documented HTTP API surface: the Authentiq Connect OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect API at `https://connect.authentiq.io`, with a published OpenAPI spec and client-based authentication.
